label: Additional hediff
description: Specifies a hediff applied as an additional effect when a DamageDef hits a pawn. Severity can scale per damage dealt, be fixed, or be scaled by a victim stat.

hediff.label: Hediff
hediff.description: HediffDef applied when the damage hits.

severityPerDamageDealt.label: Severity per damage dealt
severityPerDamageDealt.description: How much hediff severity is added per point of damage dealt.

severityFixed.label: Severity fixed
severityFixed.description: Flat severity added regardless of damage dealt. Used when severity should not scale with damage.

victimSeverityScaling.label: Victim severity scaling
victimSeverityScaling.description: StatDef on the victim that scales the added severity up or down.

inverseStatScaling.label: Inverse stat scaling
inverseStatScaling.description: If true, the victim stat divides severity instead of multiplying it.

victimSeverityScalingByInvBodySize.label: Victim severity scaling by inverse body size
victimSeverityScalingByInvBodySize.description: If true, severity is also scaled by the inverse of the victim's body size.
